{{Infobox artifact
| name = Abidan artifact
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|There may be more [[Abidan]] artifacts on [[Cradle]] than [[Monarch]] weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A low-level [[Abidan artifact]] is rumored to be in the [[Rosegold]] museum.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Northstrider]] attempted to replicate an [[Abidan artifact]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan felt the power in his [[Abidan artifact]] flickering.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
